metadata.author: Griptape, Inc.
metadata.description: SAM 3D Objects is a foundation model that reconstructs full 3D shape geometry, texture, and spatial layout from a single 2D image. Given an image and a binary object mask, it produces a Gaussian splat (PLY format) representing the 3D structure of the masked object. It supports both single-object and multi-object reconstruction workflows and handles real-world challenges such as occlusion, clutter, and unusual poses.

Reconstructs a 3D Gaussian splat of a single masked object from a 2D image. Takes an image and a binary mask (white object on black background), runs SAM 3D Objects inference, and outputs a PLY file path containing the Gaussian splat.

Reconstructs a merged 3D Gaussian splat scene from multiple masked objects in a single image. Takes an image and a list of mask images, runs SAM 3D Objects inference once per mask, merges all Gaussians into a single scene, and outputs a PLY file.
